name: Zhejiang Weiming Environment Protection Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Weiming Environment Protection Co., Ltd. provides solid waste disposal services. It focuses on solid waste-related technological development, project investment, project construction, and operational management services, as well as manufactures and sells equipment. The company also invests in, constructs, and manages 20 waste incineration and power generation projects. In addition, it offers household waste, agricultural and forestry waste, sewage leachate, sludge drying, and kitchen waste collection and treatment services. The company is headquartered in Wenzhou, China. Zhejiang Weiming Environment Protection Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Wei Ming Group.
